name: Single expatriate - Low income (30% flat-rate)
description: Single expatriate earning €35,000 with 30% income tax exemption (Article 155B)

sources.description: Verified using official French tax formula with 30% impatrié exemption (Article 155B). Social contributions on full gross (€35k). Taxable income: €18,661.65 (after 30% exemption, CSG, prof exp). Tax on quotient: €776.78.
